caption: A woman with dark, curly hair tied up in a bun wears a green t-shirt with a red and white graphic design. She is seated in a studio setting, positioned behind a black microphone on a stand. Behind her is a white backdrop featuring a logo with the text "BESS TALK 101" and "It's A Utique Hustle," as well as the words "ODCAST," "Talk About It!," and "ith U." To her left, a framed picture hangs on the wall, and a small glass of water sits on the table. Small red and white logos reading "BESS TALK 101" are overlaid on the bottom left and right of the scene. Across the frames, the woman remains in the same position, slightly shifting her gaze and facial expression while appearing to listen or prepare to speak.
